description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and defining variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=27.0.0, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=26, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=3859397. In a global before_script install apt packages, download and unzip the Android SDK tools, set ANDROID_HOME and extend PATH, run sdkmanager to update and install tools, platform-tools, build-tools;$ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, platforms;android-$ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, extras;android;m2repository, extras;google;google_play_services, extras;google;m2repository, and make gradlew executable. Define a single build stage with a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, and publish the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}_${CI_COMMIT_SHA}. The pipeline contains only the build stage with no conditional rules or additional services.
